name: Hot Cocoa Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Blend well until fully incorporated.
3. Store in a tightly covered container.
4. Makes 3 3/4 cups of mix.
5. To prepare hot cocoa, combine 1/4 cup mix and 3/4 cup boiling water.
6. Stir until smooth.
7. Serves approximately 15 portions.
